title: Excalibur | Lootr Support
description: This is a support pack that converts Lootr Mod textures to match the awesome Excalibur ResourcePack.
body:
![Lootr Presentation](https://i.postimg.cc/6Q5nFMcD/Lootr-Main-Presentation-1.png)

This is a support pack that converts [Lootr](https://modrinth.com/mod/lootr) Mod textures to match the awesome [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) resourcePack.

__**This pack contains**__

All Containers from Lootr have been retextured to match Excalibur style/theme.

__**Installation :**__

Ingame

\-> Click "Options…"

\-> Click "Resource Packs…"

\-> Click "Open Resource Pack Folder"

\-> Drag and Drop the Excalibur\_Lootr.zip file into the "resourcepacks" folder

\-> Move the Excalibur Lootr Support resource pack from the left column to the right

\-> Make sure that the support pack is placed above the original Excalibur resource pack

\-> Select "Done"

__**Models showcase**__

![Models](https://i.postimg.cc/NFSwvCRb/Lootr-Presentation-Models-1.png)

__**Credits**__

Maffhew : Author of [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) resourcepack  
Noobanidus : Author of the mod [Lootr](https://modrinth.com/mod/lootr)
